channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >be a normie >complain about rising costs of living >bitch about billionaires >*unmask the balance sheet* >12%+ frivolou… — 63 replies — 252.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>be a normie >complain about rising costs of living >bitch about billionaires >*unmask the balance sheet* >12%+ frivolou…

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-05-21 04:33 UTC

OP

>be a normie
>complain about rising costs of living
>bitch about billionaires
>*unmask the balance sheet*
>12%+ frivolous fees/month
Why can't normies budget? is it just low IQ? Like this Plebbitor spends $110 a month on completely frivolous expenses at his stage (haircuts, spotify)

Also stories from normies being shit with money.

Early replies (first 3)

62254520
>take on debt to go to university
>make $2,200 a month
lol lmao

62254533
>>62254481
How is it fucking possible to waste $96 on a fucking haircut a month? And $13 for a fucking spotify? Aren't there free unlockers which take like 3 minutes to install?

62254543
>retarded normie can't help hemorrhaging money on dumb bullshit
A tale as old as time. He could get rid of his gym membership and with just a couple months of savings buy dumbbells and a pullup bar. He can buy a $20 electric razor and just shave his head a couple times a month. Music is free, if you pay for it you're a dumbass nigger.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62255410
>>62254828
It's not about IQ. It's about how university in the US was about nepotism and gatekeeping for a defacto nobility. Everyone rushing into colleges because 'look how much better graduates do' ignored the real function of a college, elitist gatekeeping that didn't offend US courts.
Degreeflation represents the class of college grads becoming increasingly average as the cohort grew, rather than their brain power reflecting the average of that larger sample.

62255542
>>62254533
Free unlockers? Tell me more

62255552
>>62255410
https://www.icns.es/en/news/the_intellectual_quotient_of_university_students_plummets
>There is a belief that university students have a higher IQ than the general population. A recent meta-analysis has addressed this issue (Uttl et al., 2024), analyzing the average IQ scores of 9,902 students tested using intelligence tests (Weschler) in the United States and Canada, grouped by decades from 1939 to the most recent one beginning in 2019. The data sets reviewed show an approximate decline of 0.2 points in the IQ of university students per year, falling to a current IQ of 102, i.e., the level of the general population without a university education. Furthermore, following a normal distribution curve, a very high percentage of university st

62255563
Idk why anyone would need two haircuts a month but in theory you should be able to afford haircuts, gym and Spotify on even a low wage, it's not exactly the Ritz.

62256259
>>62255022
Chad phone optimizooor

Yeah the float me debt thing is very strange I hope this is b8

62256314
>>62254839
I think its more about podcasts. That guy doesn't even have a netflix account and pays 110 a month in phone bills, no way he doesn't pirate on an unlimited plan.

62256338
>>62254520
I've been there. It's tough. I make that in a week now, but holy fuck did it take a lot of initiative, blood, sweat, tears, and good timing. I don't blame them. The college industry was n America is predatory as fuck.

62256382
>>62255088
It’s not people, as anon uncovered these are all cleverly named cash apps on the App Store.
I have zero clue what’s even going on in low functioning normie land anymore and why this resistor is unable to come to the conclusion to go for one month without a shear of his mane to pay of the Cash App debt.

62256396
>>62254571
Yeah but I'm worth over $20MM so whatever

62256399
>>62254481
>36k debt
Might as well declare bankruptcy wtf. He has $0 in his bank account what are they gonna take?

62256407
>>62254680
>I have no idea how you end up owing money to a Fire Department
taken drunk by a scambulance to emergency room to sober up
t. broke out of one at the stoplight when i realized what was happening

62256424
>>62255128
yours, is the superior

62256428
>>62255552
>the_intellectual_quotient_of_university_students_plummets
>in an unrelated story, IQ tests deemed racist by teachers unions and made illegal

62256439
>>62254621
A freed slave has zero net worth. Beats being a slave.

62256468
>>62254520
>>62254481
>stuff that used to be less than 1% of your income now 50% of your income to have
>KEK SHIT WITH MONEY KEK LMAO

62256472
Public service announcement for everyone confused how you'd owe the fire department:
Call 911 for almost anything and you'll quickly understand.

62256474
>>62256468
It's only that expensive if you're a retard and can't shop for shit.

62256523
>>62256474
point is, your dollar used to stretch far enough not even 25 years ago, that no one would bat an eye at those purchases. also you would make more and more money, but that ended. now people are noticing that they are being robbed and noticing the jewish-coded system. and you guys spergout when the goys think it's bullshit. that your callous response is "you can't have those things/you're shit with money/you can't shop/etc"

pretty soon it'll be. $15 to wash your clothes at the laundromat??? Go down to the lake and rinse your clothes in fecal water. You're getting more and more retarded.

62256544
>>62256523
You're overspending multiple times what you should for certain services/commodities and when someone tries to tell you how to budget like a non-retard you sperg out about the collapse of the system. Get fucked Mr. Silver Spoon, you spend like a spoiled kid you get mocked like one.

62256554
>>62255027
The writing in the OP does not look like a woman's. Also, vaginas spent a lot more on their hair than $48 per visit, or whatever.

62256572
>living in current day in america is like living in a third world country! Slavery never went away, it just evolved!
>ORDERS 12 DOORDASHES AND DAILY STARBUCKS

62256579
>>62256544
How do I budget for exponential never ending inflation on my stagnant wage, dumb fucking cocksucker?

62256585
>>62256544
bro, anon, i love you, but stop condoning this shit already

62256781
>>62256585
He’s right. The system is fucked but most of the world would kill for $2500 a month and it’s absolutely enough if you can cook chicken and potatoes and not spend money like a woman

62256785
LLM thread lol 50 1pbitd

62256791
>>62254551
>>62256396
>I live in DC
>MM
Nice larp ranjesh now go cover yourself in jam for me boy.

62256797
>>62256791
>for you ESL's confused by this nobody in the history of american history has ever abbreviated 20m (20 million)
with 20mm
It isn't a socket you ESL faggots, now please please if you're gonna LLM spam and larp goto r9k

62256815
>>62256797
You’re not nearly as smart as you think you are. Take a deep breath

62256858
>>62256815
Yea okay Bybon, son of Phola

62256865
>>62254481
I spend 5$/month for my phone. If I go over data it just slows down a bit but I don't get charged more. I'm mostly on wifi anyway. Who pays $110/mo for a phone bill?

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 118 replies — 72.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 118 • Updated: 2026-05-21 02:59 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62237090
>>62220146
give me money

62237423
>>62219995
you're rich mate.

62238430
>>62229077
Exactly, but turning BTC into an active asset will through native staking, instead of just worrying about future risks.

62238954
>>62234248
I'm not surprised lol

62239105
>just buy into the obvious ponzi scheme bro

62240786
>>62228616
hmm find better opportunities

62241339
>>62219942
Soon I will get to that 1 BTC mark, RN I'm buying more and staking some.

62244007
>>62238430
That's the right move anon

62244072
>>62219942
Bitcoin is getting fucked by the Jews

62246429
>>62241339
I know you can do it anon

62246430
>>62239105
If it has a high likelihood to make me rich then I dont care

62246437
>>62244072
it's just the cycle

62246447
>>62219942
I don't want to buy btc

62246571
>>62221733
>Its ok. I have monkey NFTs. They are the future
It still blows my mind that people thought rare Pepes could actually be a real thing.

62248268
>>62244072
Including you?

62248275
>>62222594
Bad actors are not going to have access to a quantum computer before things get figured out.

62249623
>>62246447
No problem lol

62251167
>>62246571
I think he's just being sarcastic lol

62252826
>>62219942
based
>t. living in (((hyperinflation)))
read about monero too
its the final solution to the taxman question and makes keynesian jews seethe

62252834
>>62219942
I mined 24 bitcoin on a RX480 in 2011 and I still have them.

62252845
>>62252834
truly based if true

62252856
someone from /pol had unironically sent me some btc in 2020 when kikes blew up our port
and bankrupt our central banks
if I didn't need the cash and had to sell for fiat I would have a much needed two thousand fucking dollars right now
keep stacking brothers
death to fiat

62253066
>>62252834
RX480 was released in 2016 you LARPer

62253216
>>62252856
Crazy I'm from lebanon too and someone didn't send me any btc because I'm not a serial begger, I too could use a very much needed 2k right now crazy!

62253224
>>62252856
This guys an israeli scammer btw he just makes scams out of any trend clearly he struck it big in 2020 as he said someone sent him multiple bitcoins and he's still here pretending.
He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.

62253228
>>62252856
He's also pretending his sister killed herself and asking for money for it in XMR threads.
Last it was his dad that died but only after he got 8k for it.
Fucker has probably got 7 figures

62254644
>>62253228
8K?
nigger I would fucking beat you up just because you're that spiteful
I never claimed I had a sister
>>62253216
iza 3anjad e7ki 3arabe yalla
>>62253224
>He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.
kek
I posted proof so many times
seethe more jew

62254676
>>62253224
>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
how dense are you
I even showed the screencap it was like 300$ total

62255610
>>62254676
>>62254644
Ah look the scammers still here even after mass reporting my thread lol, schizo scammer melty schizo melty lol fucking faggot I got your number, next your identity.
I got some faggots from /g/ working on it.
You just thought you were immune to exposure.
You're dead wrong and this time I want to see who you are.

62256655
>>62255610
Moron

item.title: If Link gigamooned in 2020 many of you would have lost your fortunes already or OD’d on drugs or something or at minimum… — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
If Link gigamooned in 2020 many of you would have lost your fortunes already or OD’d on drugs or something or at minimum…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-05-21 04:24 UTC

OP

If Link gigamooned in 2020 many of you would have lost your fortunes already or OD’d on drugs or something or at minimum be bored as fuck by now. You should be thanking Sergey that’s he’s drawing out this process and subduing Link’s price just as everyone is about to be fucked by job losses thanks to Link. Then the price will moon and you will live happily every after and actually appreciate your investment and feel much better about yourself knowing you invested in the tech that ultimately saved you and your families existence.

Early replies (first 3)

62256148
Also shot out to Ari. A pimp.

62256154
>>62256142
>>62256148
ok but now linkies suffer from the Pain and Misery Curse and if left untreated it will become the Humiliation and Cuckoldry Curse. how does that make you feel

62256184
Who gives a fucking about the chainlink my nigga
Ride another pump, it's the same thing my nigga

Ooh Ooh...
Ooh Ooh...
Ooooohoohoooo....

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62256197
>>62256142
>dude while you wait for link to do its thing you should get a job and learn skills and improve yourself and deal in the real world for another 10 more years
Sounds like being a wageslave with extra steps.

62256226
It was always a generational hodl

62256248
>i bet those grapes are sour anyway

Classic slave morality

62256267
It owuld be cool to make 4 million dollars on 5000 invested at 1 dollar if link went to 1k eoy 2021 but also
>you would have spent it all and kys'd
So? At least I would have been a millionaire.

62256377
>>62256154
>faggot troon bloviating about curses and faggotry
shove your magic mumbo jumbo up your ass, disgusting freak

62256388
>>62256142
Ok then why is Sergey doing perfectly fine?

62256725
>>62256388
He was already rich?

62256731
>>62256377
>stinkie cannot accept that he is cursed
sad

62256842
>>62256142
>gigamooned
lol zoomers and their ability to make up words

item.title: LINK or SOL? — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
LINK or SOL?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-05-21 04:34 UTC

OP

LINK or SOL?

Early replies (first 3)

62255693
>>62255690
Why not both?

62255719
ETH

62255769
>>62255690
sol is cheaper now

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62255854
>>62255690

SOL

62255877
>>62255693
I buyed 5 SOL and 10 LINK

62256859
>>62255719
this

ETH and XRP = best combo

62256861
>>62255690
SOUL

62256870
>>62255690
Sol 100%, links value prop is still 10 years away. If you buy this shit you'll hate yourself for 10 years straight. Stay far far far far far far far far far far away, i really hope you see how many times I typed far...

item.title: HODL and buy more BTC. — 33 replies — 22.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
HODL and buy more BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-05-21 03:08 UTC

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757
How much BTC are you holding right now anon?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62246449
XMR will offer better returns

62246464
>>62245741
>If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?
Bitcoin will be banned because of Iran

62246468
>hes shilling goy gold in May of 2026
Grim

62246506
>>62245757
This, I ain’t fuckin buying pumped bags.

62246878
>>62245760
Self-custody really becomes important once people understand why Bitcoin was created in the first place.

62247229
>>62246449
When new ATH?

62247257
All in on BTC and BOTZ

62247324
>>62245741
Nty. I'd rather buy s&p and get a 10x hahah.

62247434
>>62245741
I can't buy much. First my other crypto which have performed well since buying them reach their target prices and then maybe I rotate into BTC.

62248271
>>62246464
That's not possible lol.

62248573
>>62246468
Why gold tho?

62249613
>>62246506
So what are you buying?

62250313
>>62247229
1k eoy

62250366
>>62245757
>>62245760
>>62246464
>>62246506
>>62247324
>>62250313

62251176
>>62247257
>All in on BTC and BOTZ
Why BOTZ?

62252318
>>62247324
What about an altcoins?

62252439
>>62245741
Hey op, I hope your message finds some newfag lurking right now. Bitcoin is the next bitcoin.

62252472
No coiner here.
I’m a poorfag can you give me two good reasons why I should buy bitcoin instead of (no soft shilling) when it and (no soft shilling) are the new system? It seems to me that all that market cap will move onto the (no soft shilling).

62252488
>>62245741
i need IT below 50k or iam not buying

62252859
>>62252472
What will you shill for bitcoin when it's the #1 mcap

62252912
>>62245741
Waiting for an actual capable organization to release something similar so its actually a crime if someone steals it.

62252970
>>62252488
Better buy now and hodl goy

62253489
>>62252970
Holding is good but native BTC utility is getting bigger too. Better if your BTC is being staked instead of just sitting idle the whole cycle.

62253499
>>62247434
As long as you have a plan and targets, you’re already ahead of most emotional traders.

62253652
>>62253489

This is the way. And diversify. Coins like Monero and Nerva are private like cash, and in the case of Nerva it can't even be centralized/pooled due to how it changes algorithms. TRX is another for the list because it has the highest concentration of stablecoin transactions. Don't stick to just one asset: treat them like stocks.

62254516
>>62250313
What's your basis for that?

62254625
>>62246438
This much, and heres my home address. Theres a wrench in the top drawer in the kitchen, my room is upstairs and to the left.

62256658
>>62253489
I don't think we can stake btc
>>62253652
Why people are crazy about monero?

62256668
>>62254625
You're poor and you don't have even 1 btc in your wallet.

62256679
>>62252472
You should buy btc and treat as your savings

OP

and we're NEVER selling!

Early replies (first 3)

62253356
>>62252789
$5 EOY

KABOOOOOOOOOM

62254273
>>62252789
Incredible how the cuckolds worship a fat Slav that kept them poor

62254436
>everybody hates stiiiiinks

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62254466
>>62252789
Me on the right.

62256879
>>62252789

item.title: Best investment — 28 replies — 16.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Best investment

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-05-21 02:57 UTC

OP

If you get 100% VA disability you get a $4K dividend every single month for the rest of your life

Early replies (first 3)

62255102
>>62254805
this is a no brainer. If i were a mutt i would enlist. I hear you only need to spend a few years in and you're set for life basically?

62255133
>>62254805
to escape permanent underclass, simply became permanently disabled for life in a military action

62255148
>PTSD from killing innocent brown kids so billionaires can get rich from more oil
no thanks, I don't have what it takes to kill people and not be plagued by guilt for the rest of my life

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62255160
>>62254805
I work with a guy with this and his wife spends 6k a month

62255328
>>62255148
Based and rare anon that isn’t morally bankrupt

62255340
>>62254805
how ironic is it that every anon's parents likely told them only losers go to the military but military route ended being for the biggest winners in life?

62255638
>>62255148
You can get a job in the military where you dont kill people. Dummy.

62255707
I get free healthcare for life (no dental sadly), a stipend every month, the gov't is currently paying me to go to college, preferential treatment at businesses, etc. All for something I viewed as just a job at the time.
I'm not bragging, by any means. Just saying the benefits are real for about 4-6 years of your life.

62255886
>>62255133
>>62255148
Except being 100% disabled from the VA is super easy. Look at the retards on Caleb hammer, they'll claim they have insomnia or anxiety or other bullshit and qualify

62255934
>>62255886
100% is hard if you dont lie, and if you lie the govt may rape you. Plus, lying for gibs makes you black.

62255936
>>62255886
Tinnitus is my favorite, I hope all VA fags get vanned and drafted.

62255952
>>62255936
Tinnitus barely gets you any % though. Insomnia, migraines, and PTSD are what do it.

And liars can get fucked, but I'd trade the income to make the migraines go away.

62255960
>>62254805
I get that just from 1 unit and I don't have to have a ruined body and have been a zogbot slave

62256359
>>62255960
1 unit of?

62256363
>>62255707
Getting disability isn't a cakewalk though? Are you actually disabled?

62256369
>>62255952
propanolol you have high blood pressure.
>t. 7 years of medical knowledge through being a rare case study

62256379
>>62254805
I have a 3rd C&P exam next month anon. Wish me luck, I hoping for 80% when all is said and done

62256381
>>62256379
You will get 100%, brother!

62256401
>>62256363
Yeah. I never lied or exaggerated on my claim.

62256412
>>62255934
All fair points but point is you don't have to be injured to get a fuckload of disability

62256441
>>62256412
You're just naive, man. Just because your idea of disabled is person in a wheelchair or missing limbs doesn't mean that's right. A lot of people claim debilitating mental issues. You can't SEE those injuries.
Doesn't mean those don't exist.

62256466
>>62256381
Here's hoping. I paid for a Nexus DBQ which I hope helps.

62256498
>>62254805
>$4K dividend every single month for the rest of your life
wait, do you think that's enough to live on in the US?

62256506
>>62256498
I can guarantee it is more than enough.

62256536
Will they ever take it away bros? Shit is all over youtube and online now. Niggers in facebook groups scammaxxing

62256545
>>62256498
I make 10k a month and have 2 coworkers get $4k from having 100% too. It's not exactly 4k either is a couple hundred more

62256577
>>62256536
Save your money.

62256651
>>62255886
This I know first responders that are on disability for mental trauma from seeing things. Literally anybody who is a vet can do the same and claim PTSD

item.title: Job hunting is a literal humiliation ritual — 17 replies — 11.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Job hunting is a literal humiliation ritual

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-05-21 03:04 UTC

OP

So not only do I have to go over your dogshit online questionnaire and fill it out manually even though it's just gonna be filtered by an AI that could just be fed a PDF and be done with it
I also have to tell you exactly how much I earned before, what's the lowest I can tolerate you paying me, and even explain any other benefits I may or may not have had so you know exactly how much you can rip me off?
Can't we please just burn every HR single roastie on a stake?

Early replies (first 3)

62252002
>>62251998
>he doesn't aggressively lie on job applications
ngmi

62252007
It's probably not even a real job they just want to use your data to figure out how much they are overpaying their current staff so they can do a layoff.

62252008
>>62252002
that's the entire point. why the fuck is a job interview like dating?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62252016
>>62251998
>Specify the amount and currency
Lmfao have fun competing with Indians who will take 1/10th your salary

62252023
>>62251998
Indeed — https://www.indeed.com/
LinkedIn Jobs — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs
ZipRecruiter — https://www.ziprecruiter.com/
SimplyHired — https://www.simplyhired.com/
Monster — https://www.monster.com/
Glassdoor — https://www.glassdoor.com/index.htm
FlexJobs (Remote/Flexible) — https://www.flexjobs.com/
Dynamite Jobs (Remote) — https://www.dynamitejobs.com/
Dice (Tech/IT) — https://www.dice.com/

62252027
I just lie now. I've had two interviews where I said I had two years of experience and then they claimed 3. Next time I will claim 5. Fuck you.

62252033
>>62251998
yeah its legit the most brutal shit ever. Some of these retarded job applications ask for your SSN or a 1 min selfie video recording like get real hahaha

62252034
>>62251998
lie against you, say you want minimum wage possible, they hire (you) over other candidates and then you don't show up for work, lol

62252054
>>62251998
>gonna be filtered by an AI
then use an ai to tailor to that ai

62252055
The job itself is also a humiliation ritual

62252092
>>62252033
>1 min selfie video recording like get real hahaha
i unironically sat down, recorded myself for an entire 90 seconds talking about what i like to do in christmas like a fucking imbecile, uploaded one of those dogshit videos for AI review and this is what i got

62252096
>>62251998
if you had skills in demand anon you wouldnt have to even fill these out. I worked for an underpaid company that had clients that were businesses and my performance and skills outed me. All I had to do was mention to them I was available and they didn't even interview me, just picked me right up.
>You had all your life to develop skills that people would look for and you chose what?

62252109
>>62252092
many such cases i just close the application when they ask for a video kek not doing that shit

62252326
>>62252092
I’d say their screening is pretty good because it filtered out a brown subhuman

62252359
>>62251998
Its fake
Its gay
Why is everything still pumping

62252377
>>62252055
This

Slavery is horrible

62256669
>>62251998
Just start your own MIC connected, tech adjacent, foreign labour importing, NWO, front company

item.title: 3 years ago LINK cucks — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
3 years ago LINK cucks

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-05-21 04:31 UTC

OP

were warning fuddies that they were going to hell and that Chainlink was about to moon (it was trading at $8). Yet here we are at $9

NEVER LISTEN TO LINK SHILLS

Early replies (first 3)

62252499
2023 feels like 80 years ago

62252762
>>62252494
CLL wil post another breadcrumb and the cuckolds will come up with a new meme date. I've seen baggies saying LINK will pump in Q4 now

62253363
>>62252494
BULGARIAN TRANNY PORN ADDICTS WANT TO STEAL MY PRECIOUS TOKENS!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62253371
>NEVER LISTEN TO LINK SHILLS

they are so dumb, they believe their own lies.

62253384
Never marry your bag.
I married eth in 2017.
It worked well until 2021.
Late 2021-2025 my nw did nothing while everything ripped
Finally sold in 2025, not ideal price, ~2000. I had 8k eth.
Already more than 2x everything by being free of eth, nw ~43M. Hype + semi stocks. I'm close to making it.

Divorce your link and escape the permanent underclass.

62253625
fuck stiiinks
hate em alll :}

62254257
>>62253625
this but unironically

62254486
>>62252494
Hahahahaha LINK baggots must be the most retarded bunch on /biz/

62254552
>duuuuuuuude i'm so dangerous

oh yeah how's that? you aren't even in shape right now

>duuuuuuuuude i'll hire hitmen to hunt you down

oh really wow, you must be connected to the underworld

>duuuuuuuuude being on the chans means i have secret powers!!

oh you mean a public website anyone in the world with internet can use? wow man you're nuts

>duuuuuude the world can't let me have 2 million dollars

interesting how it let memecoin holders, eth, early btc, etc all make money, but they decided to single out your cult

>duuuuuuuude that's because we'll take over the world!!

yeah man, "they" sure won't know what to do against "rich" people like that
ive said it before, but the incel revenge fantasy might be the most hilarious thing ever on this board

62254566
>>62252494
Man 2027 is Chainlink's baggieversary.
What should we prepare?
There has to be a big humiliation event.

62254577
>>62254566
Maybe a livestream of some sorts, top 10 biggest bagholder wallets.
A digest of all the memes, maybe try to get in touch with a baggie and have him on stage.

62254590
Well, fuddies are going to hell, unless they repent and turn from their wicked ways

62256219
>>62252494
this one's riled up

62256862
>>62254590
>shills a globohomo Saturnian token and the Great Reset
>thinks he’s going to heaven
NGMI

item.title: how do LINK shills refute this? — 49 replies — 9.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
how do LINK shills refute this?

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-05-20 23:23 UTC

OP

how do LINK shills refute this?

Early replies (first 3)

62240980
>>62240977
Self checked

62240982
>>62240977
cringe CLL meme. price + chart + take the L

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244910
>>62244909
>yeah and from the same perspective xrp's chart looks better
Incorrect.
LINK has outperformed both BTC and XRP.

62244925
>>62244910
weird how I feel raped even though I'm up 3x still from my dca many years ago and in that same time if I had bought btc instead of link I'd be up ~15x and if I bought xrp I'd be up ~10x
so show me the crazy specific timeframe that link did better
was I supposed to buy ico and sell the top?

62244930
>>62244925
sorry xrp would have been 5x, btc would be like 12-15x

62244939
>>62244013
I'm making money on tech while also holding link. It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent

62244943
>>62244925
>>62244930
LINK has outperformed XRP.
Cope all you want, it's just the facts.

62245194
>>62240980
Act like you belong here fagbag. Self checking is reddit

62245221
>>62244943
kek
full tard detected
>no wonder your in shitlink

62245265
>>62245221
WoW dud you are right!
Just market sold all my stinks!

62245492
>>62244357
>I have 40k LINK staked since v0.1

you're down 1.6 million

>i dont post alpha here

bro you can be honest... you have no alpha

62245509
>>62244943
>LINK has outperformed XRP.

not lately... xrp went 7x in the '25 run whereas link could barely double

it's funny watching the cult gaslight their newer members for not getting in early on the pyramid scheme. really smart community decision to shit all over your investors. then they're shocked there's no new buyers

62245517
>>62245492
You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

62245520
>>62242019
OK link me to anyone with a portfolio anywhere on the entire internet with bnb that's 5 or 6 figures. You can't because they don't exist, this board is trash so what's your alternative, twitter where they openly run scams? Reddit where they're years behind everything (gme started here, reddit only picked it up at the very end)?

62245534
>>62245517
Its because they're comparing their own ROI to what they think they could have had. They all hold link. They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!", as if everyone here could have just bought BNB 6 years ago and been millionaires. When everyone DOES buy, like trumpcoin, it rugs immediately.

62245561
>>62245534
>They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!"
I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
Basically pic related.

62245695
>>62244013
How many of the OGs actually held until now?

62245721
With picrel. Image from 3 days ago, but whatever.

62245775
fuck link chuddies

62245782
>>62244013
I'm still here taking a shit from my venice hotel room rn. Link will moon, you will see. It's just taking longer than expected. Which is a golden opportunity for those who missed the others.

62245800
>>62245517
>You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

don't be so dramatic. it's an investment board. calculating gains/losses and opportunity cost is part of the discussion.


>>62245561
>I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
>Basically pic related.

i think you have to tell yourself that lie in order to protect your ego. you have to tell yourself there's just no way an investor can't understand your genius play. they would have to be indian scammers to not see it

pretty juvenile thinking but i guess when you're down 5+ years straight and just missed the bull market, you have to come up with something

62245837
>>62245782
Literally nothing will pump this shitcoin, it will suffer the same fate as Kleros, an infinite permableed until a massive -50% wick destroys the spirit of remaining 2017 bagholders.
There are no net new big wallets, same baggies rotating the same bags, pretending staking yield makes up for a chart that looks like a stairway to hell.
Chainlink is one big permissioned, KYC'd, network, nobody with a crypto ethos wants to touch this trash with a 10-foot pole.
The biggest joke? LINK absorbed billions in TVL and still can't match LZ's volume.

62245840
>>62245721
>uncle rico bragging about gains from 7 years ago


bro we get it, you got some chicks' number in high school


the link cult is basically akin to boomers bragging about how they bought a house back in the day for $50k. they've conflated existing during a certain time period with having actual investment skill.

but that's the great thing about investing. even a blind squirrel finds a nut once in a while

62245849
Touch me

62246030
>>62244943
>>62245509
this
what the faggots don't realize is that xrp has had like 11 years for you to buy where you'd still be up and like 2 weeks in 2018 and last year to buy to be down
chainlink has had many more years for you to buy to be down and it's newer than xrp
thankfully I'm not down or I'd hate link (and myself) even more

62247125
>>62244939
>It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent
you watched it do an inverse 10x, that qualifies

62248627
>>62247125
Projection by top buyers
LINK fuddies = top buyers

62248634
>>62248627
>2021
$53

>2026
$9

cuckoldry is a hell of a drug

62251394
>>62240967
the tokenomics and project development are better than the rest
#1 by development
chainlink reserve and payment abstraction mean the project growth and fees get converted into LINK

62254623
>>62240967 dude just bet on redcoin
>>62240992 kek

62254629
>>62245492
if you're so smart, show your trades asshole
turns out you make the best guesses you can like the rest of us
>redcoin.png

62256158
>>62244357
love it when stupid stankies brag about their OTHER gains lmaooooooo yeah cuz u ain't braggin about link that's for sure

item.title: My parents are renters in their late 60's They're going to get an inheritance soon, but they said "if we can't afford to… — 35 replies — 6.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
My parents are renters in their late 60's They're going to get an inheritance soon, but they said "if we can't afford to…

Open thread • Replies: 35 • Updated: 2026-05-20 23:29 UTC

OP

My parents are renters in their late 60's

They're going to get an inheritance soon, but they said "if we can't afford to get the house we want to buy, then we aren't gona buy one, and we'll just leave the money in the bank and get interest"

How can I convince them to not be fucking retarded and just buy a fucking house?

If they live another 20 years that money will be fucking destroyed from inflation and then i'll get nothing, but at least if they buy a house it will have protected the value of their inheritance.


I bet im gona have to deal with 4chan telling me "ERM ACTUALLY UR PARENTS ARE RIGHT, THEY SHOULD KEEP THE MONEY IN THE BANK AND LIVE OFF THE INTEREST, DONT TELL THEM TO BUY A HOUSE!" because 4chan has to always be contrarian to the OP
fyi: The reason my parents never became home owners is because my mom could never "find the perfect house" and she "didn't want to buy something that isnt exactly what she wanted" and shes doing this shit again now when they finally have a chance to soon 1-shot purchase a home and never have to worry about rent again.

Early replies (first 3)

62253481
Nobody cares about your boomer parents lil nigga.

62253664
>>62253429
Tell them to buy a house if they care at least a little bit about You and what will happen with You after they die. Tell them that You're willing to help they with maintenance around the house would they like to. Tell them that it will help You later in life too. That its one of the better ways to preserve value. Or at the very least convince then to give You at least small part of their inheritance. If nothing will do, You're basically wasting Your breath on them as they dont give a damn shit about You.

62253708
man stop thinking about this inheritance

your parents are rentucks at 60, they wont leave you a single cent

they are too stupid for that

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62254206
>>62253708
Warren Buffett wished he had rented

62254216
>>62253429
My dad died and a lost money paying for the funeral. Mom is still alive though at least

62254225
>>62254206
he can still become a rentcuck if thats what he really wants

62254227
>>62253708
They can make 1 good financial decision in their life at least and put the inheritance theyre getting into buying a home.


They already got 1 inheritance already like 8 years ago, about $500k, and that $500k is down to $150k.

I told them to buy a house back then and they said they couldnt afford anything back then where they wanted to live.

So theyve basically slowly spent most of it so far.

Theyre so fucking stubborn about it too its insane.

A $400k house 8 years ago is like $1M+ and when i told them that they said "UHHHH BUT WE ARENT GONA BUY A HOUSE WE DONT WANT, WE ARENT JUST GONA LIVE ANYWHERE JUST BECAUSE YOU WANT TO INHERIT SOMETHING OFF US LATER"

62254239
>>62254227
>>62253708
>>62253664

To say more on this.

Basically its entirely my mom (not my dad, he doesnt care, he just goes along with whatever my mom says)

My mom has it in her head that unless she can live in the perfect area with a clean new home, that she doesnt want it. So basically she needs like $1.5-2M dollars to buy the type of house she wants in the area she wants.

What theyve been doing is renting homes around these areas, so they can live in those areas, but without being able to afford owning in those areas, if that makes any sense.

They dont want to "move out" and buy something affordable in an area they dont want to live in.

So theyd prefer to just keep cash in the bank and have it slowly drain away from inflation and spending then actually own an asset that holds value over time

62254241
>>62254206
Probably because the property he bought is in Nebraska kek

62254255
>>62254241
So much for being inbred rural and a hick. He certainly didn't enjoy it.

62254266
I'm so lucky that my parents aren't selfish retards. Sorry OP that sounds miserable. I'm not being left a fortune but at least I'm being left with a house that has been recently renovated within the past 10 years and is in a good enough area for now at least.

62254269
>>62254239
>>62254227
your mom just want to do nothing and spend the inheritance without any worries

stop talking to them if they didnt buy a house 6 months after getting the inheritance

it will save you some precious time because you wont get a penny from them obviously

62254282
>>62254269
She could "do nothing and spend the inheritance" by owning a home and not having to pay rent.

62254292
>>62254282
she is a woman, she is dumb

stop talking with them if they didnt secure the bag 6 months after getting it

dont pay for their medical bills when they contact you in 10 years

im sorry you have such parents bro, my mother is an angel in comparison she literally refused inheritance from her parents to give it to us and she bought real estate with all my father s money when he passed away in 1996

62254300
>>62254292
Her only knowledge of money is that her brother lost like $100k on stocks in the 1990's and ever since then shes convinced investing is a scam

62254303
>>62253722
Greedy little shit. You wait your turn.

62254309
>>62254300
her brother bought high and sold low

62254330
>>62254309
Its crazy to me how her seeing 1 bad experience from investing made her completely against investing.

62254333
>>62254239
It's so over

62254376
>>62254330
I feel bad for you anon because your mom is the type of person you will just never get through to. Some people convince themeelves of something and no matter how wrong or harmful that thing is they will stick to it forever. Your best chance would probably be getting your dad on your side but it doesnt sound like that would help much.

62254386
>>62254239
Typical stupid foid behavior. I don't even know on whom You should be angrier more. Your mom for being spoiled bitch or Your father for being spineless? In this day and age, getting a property for a kid to inherit later in life should be the bare minimum for parents and You parents failed. Just like >>62254266 anon, I didn't inherit much except a shit house I am slowly renovating and 5kUSD and I cannot comprehend not having even that. I am really sorry for You anon, but Your best bet would be to just cut Your losses and let them go, otherwise They'll call You few years later once they burn through all of their cash and medical bills starts to pile up to screw You one last time before they kick the bucket.

62254528
>>62253429
until you can prove that they are too elderly and disabled to manage their finances, to become an executor, you will not influence any control over their wealth. my suggestion to you would be to drop it for a time so that you do not instigate any further suspicions from your mother who is clearly opposed.

62254681
Your parents are right, this is a renter's market right now compared to home prices. Home prices have gone up faster than real estate historically ever has and only some retard degenerate son would think it's a good idea to buy a house now
>>No I'm doing this for ME not for THEM!
Lmao

>Never have to pay rent again
Roof hot water tank foundation work repaint siding taxes (that they raise every year) updating the electricity and plumbing repainting interior redoing floors.
Basically I look at houses and the vast majority of them, within the next 5-10 years, have literally a 50,000 dollar price tag slapped onto them extra because of upcoming work that needs to be done.

62254740
>>62254239
Anon, you may need to sit down before you read the next sentence.
Your parents want to spend everything they have earned or inherited before they die.
They do not care about you. Your posts make it clear they will leave you debt ibstead of an inheritance when they die.
Good luck cutting the cord.

62254884
>>62254681
only retards rent

>>62254740
grim

62254910
Never understood why people care about inheritence by the time my parents got anything they were in their late 60s like by that time you are too old to enjoy it anyways just work on making g your own money instead of waiting until you are old for some windfall that might not even happen

62255574
>If they live another 20 years that money will be fucking destroyed

You should live your life like you're not getting a cent from them and hope for the best. There's really nothing you can say that will change their minds about their money, and giving them advice is only going to make them resent you and spend it on stupider shit to teach you a lesson. It's not a way to live life either, waiting around for your parents to die so you can get an inheritance instead of dealing in the real world. It's a subconscious thing, you expect an inheritance in the future so you spend more now, maybe not work as hard, etc. Just hope for the best man, its out of your control and theres no use stressing out over it.

62255578
>>62254333
Did the ref have the day off?

62255606
>>62254681
>Roof hot water tank foundation work repaint siding taxes (that they raise every year) updating the electricity and plumbing repainting interior redoing floors.
Basically I look at houses and the vast majority of them, within the next 5-10 years, have literally a 50,000 dollar price tag slapped onto them extra because of upcoming work that needs to be done.

This is the same tired old cope. By the time a house needs $50k in (one-time) work, average rent would’ve climbed to $30k+ a year. Also property tax is tax-deductible making it almost negligible if you make over 100k

62255798
>>62254330
Normies are retarded like this, ESPECIALLY women. They dont understand sample sizes.

62255805
>>62253429
Bro your parents are retarded, just cause their central heating to leak carbon monoxide so they die and you get the money. Only way.

62256102
You will find that you are much more retarded than your parents, OP. A house is a liability, not an asset. Chances are if you actually inherited a hypothetical house you wouldn’t have enough money to pay for roof repairs. What if the foundation turns out faulty from tree roots? Also you pay rent to the jew that is the state property taxes. Honor thy father and thy mother, genius.

62256169
>>62254216
>paying for the funeral
>>62253429
>my mom
>>62255574
>nothing you can say

its simple, kill your mom. fentanyl in her evening cocktail? must have been a heart attack, no autopsy please (we're jewish) gotta get her in the ground today

item.title: TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog — 72 replies — 5.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-05-20 15:40 UTC

OP

Why are they so riled up?

Early replies (first 3)

62244594
>they

its a dysgenic thing, who knows

62244608
Boom status?

62244615
>>62244587
You do know that those threads are made by link holders right?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62247391
>>62247251
the fud is boring? how about the shilling? how about link itself? who fucking cares about a $9 stable coin, bitch? show me the money. SHOW ME THE FUCKING MONEY

62247620
>>62247440
tl;dr = fuck every single stink

62247642
>>62247251
Price and chart. Thats literally it. Nothing else matters besides the price.
If the price was $1000, fud couldnt exist

62247656
>>62244587
>fuddie
they're just mocking you, they're not "fud'ing"

62248459
>>62247642
>If the price was $1000, fud couldnt exist
HAHAHAHAHAHAHA
You must be new here.

When price is high: topped out, top signal, dump imminent, no room to grow
When price is low: price & chart, dead altcoin, dino coin, tnn etc

No marketing: radio silence, no transparency, no communication
Marketing: top signal, cringe, reeks of desperarion

Small team: two man team, russian scam, no offices
Big team: 700 HR roasties, zoom calls will be the end of you

LINK is a security: banks can’t touch it, illegal to use, adoption impossible
LINK is a commodity: no investor protection, insiders can legally rugpull you

62248467
>>62247391
What shilling?
There hasn't been a link shill thread in years

62248470
>>62248467
KABOOOOOOOOM
fxcking bullish link kaboom

62248532
>>62246964
Do you have any idea how unnatural it is for someone like you to be aware of deep lore like this?

>>62246257
Just mention XRP in a Link thread and he will appear.
Like I said, he is most likely just another larp by the same schizophrenic nutcase who spams under the Thomas/Adem larp.

62248535
We do this because you linkfags keep shitting on XRP forcing that shitty "boom" meme

Go fuck yourselves

62248561
>>62247642
Pic is fud spam from the spring of 2020, when Link had been beating the market for nearly two years straight.
Price has nothing to do with the fud spam.

If you read the fud, it's about Coinbase teaming up with Compound to make their own oracle, making Chainlink not needed.
No points for guessing what happened soon after.

62248593
>>62248561
such KABOOOOOOOOOM
fxckings bullish link

62248620
>>62248535
>>62248593
The boom meme is only a few months old, xerpies have been spamming Link fud religiously for nearly a decade.
Also the boom thing is from xerpies spamming that shit in Swift tweet comments.

62250765
>>62246964
fud harder cuck, massa's gonna liquidate you
>>62247391
use a filter bitch

62250818
>>62248561
>No points for guessing what happened soon after.


you lost 50% since then while every other market hit all time highs

62251273
>>62247391
>the fud is boring? how about the shilling?
what shilling you nigger piece of shit, there is 20 fud threads daily for literal years

62251282
>>62244587
Most link fud comes from neurotic holders that are down tens of thousands of dollars whom are pissed off

62251321
>>62244587
they want you to sell real bad, something big is almost here

62251336
>>62251282
rookie numbers but no, most LINK fud comes from paid jeets / nigerians

62251343
>>62251336
cope
it's copers & seethers
such as yourself, stinkie :}
we know your type

62251345
>>62251343
oh this ones riled up

62251349
>>62244587
the only "people" (bots) "buying" (posting about) chainlink are stuck in a reply loop with other "people" (bots)

62251351
>>62244594
10/10 pic

62251357
>>62244587
OOOOOOO, They chimpin out!

62251359
>>62248459
0 gains for 7 years is exactly why youre so bothered by "fud"

62252169
>>62247391
filter it then so you'll never have to see a thread about something you "don't care" about again.
>>62251359
riled
>>62251343
riled up!

62252468
>>62244594
HAHAHAHAH MY SIDES
THE AVENGERS

62252475
>>62251282
>tens of thousands
if only it was that little

62252496
>>62251357
>>62252468
>$9
THE cuckolds of crypto are SEETHING

62254089
>>62252475
they are really poor, actually it's probably less

item.title: $9 — 25 replies — 5.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
$9

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-05-20 23:55 UTC

OP

one Turkish gooner and a small Balkan nation (Bulgaria) completely destroyed a globohomo WEF approved crypto cult.

The antichrist isn’t as strong as he wants you to believe

Early replies (first 3)

62244055
>>62243976
Eth is not allowed to pump!

62244104
>>62243976
Hey
Basically I'm just not gonna sell them (my LINK tokens!)
I know.... UGH I know..... I'm sorry!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
It's just that I'm not gonna sell is all
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

62244378
>>62244104
Hey
Basically I'm just not gonna buy the cuckold token (LINK)
I know.... UGH I know..... I'm sorry!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
It's just that I'm not gonna buy is all
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244698
KABOOOOOOOM LINK BABY

62244725
kek another thread, you fuddies are assmad

62244731
>>62244725
we're jealous of your huge gains over the past 6 years :)

62246087
>>62243976
Adem seriously won. He defeated the avocados

62246112
>>62243976
This but for incels.

62246166
Ever since the layer zero debacle fuddies have been going extra hard. Interesting coincidence

62246227
>>62246166
I nooticed too
Turns out fuddies are paid for by "competitors" after all

62246281
>>62244731
This is weird FUD cause I bought in 2023 and I'm still doing pretty good, I sold a little bit at 20$.

62246287
>>62246166
That is coincidental timing

62246841
Hey
Basically I'm..... just gonna..... KABOOOM token (LINK)
I know.... UGH I know..... I'm sorry!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
It's just that I'm gonna KABOOOM is all
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

62246976
>>62243976
Here's the crazy part to me. I bought a base model Subaru Impreza for about $25k 5 years ago. Ive driven it every day to and from work, to get groceries, to go on trips, I've smoked in it and it's gotten a few scratches from hitting a few shopping carts. Carvana is offering me $19k for it.
In comparison if I would've bought $25k of LINK I would have had no car and would now have $5k worth of LINK.
Imagine getting outperformed by almost 4x by economy car depreciation. Lmao.

62247060
>>62246976
>Turns out, if you buy the top and sell the bottom you lose money
god tier fud

62247111
>>62247060
kek
alternatively,
>>62246976
>Here's the crazy part to me. I bought a base model Subaru Impreza for about $25k 8 years ago. Ive driven it every day to and from work, to get groceries, to go on trips, I've smoked in it and it's gotten a few scratches from hitting a few shopping carts. Carvana is offering me $19k for it.
>In comparison if I would've bought $25k of LINK I would have had no car and would now have $1.25 million worth of LINK.
>Imagine throwing away generational wealth for a Subaru. Lmao.

62248608
>>62247060
The post that buckbroke fuddies

62248628
>>62248608
6 years of ZERO gains lmao

THE cuckolds of crypto

62251510
>>62246976
cool story anon, good that you enjoy your new car.

62251807
>>62243976
so you admit that there IS a coordinated FUD campaign. the 8th time in 48248825828 posts

62252483
>>62251807
Nope you’re just a cuckold getting upset because people make fun of your 2017 shitcoin

62252668
>>62243976
BOOOOOOOM!!!! SO BULLISH LINK!!!!!!!!!! WE ARE HAVING MAJOR AWESOME WEALTH!!!!!

62252801
>>62251807
KABOOOOOM WE'RE PROUD KEKOLDS!

62256229
>>62244731
>>62243976
riled
>>62244725
>>62246227
>>62246166
it was the DTCC integration too

62256232
>>62252483
>>62252801
I think it's hilarious you fudcucks (since we're throwing out insults) anons fud so hard for a token they hate so much.

item.title: THIS IS NOT OK — 13 replies — 2.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
THIS IS NOT OK

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-20 22:24 UTC

OP

DO YOU UNEMPLOYED LOSERS HAVE NOTHING BETTER TO DO? DO YOU NOT UNDERSTAND HOW VALUABLE THE TIME OF AN HR PERSON IS?

Early replies (first 3)

62255009
>>62254999
>This isn't ok, is it?
>Oh would someone please tell me what is okay and what isn't??!
>Help! Am I allowed to do this?
>I need someone to tell me what's ok or not
Fuck these people

62255179
>>62254999
anyone that ends their email with lol deserves to be hired desu

62255257
>>62254999
People with real jobs will answer the phone while loudly shitting.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62255261
kek my Lebanon expose thread got pruned

62255311
its so funny how people with fuck you money will act at work

i remember before quitting my last job that my manager was pressuring me into organizing a meeting on teams with a big client and i was just acting like my connexion was very bad

the day we had the meeting planned, created by my manager, i had a flight planned at the exact time of the meeting so i told him i have diarrhea by email with a coworker on Cci and we laughed about it for months before i finally get put on PIP on laid off

62255317
>>62255261
You’re spamming that shit in every thread. You need to see a shrink man. It’s for your own good

62255321
>apply for job
>some scumfuck recruiter replies
>waste my time with the "oh yeah the job is closed BUT GIVE ME YOUR RESUME and we'll see what else there is"
>some retarded whore tells me about how I should have prepared better in highschool and gone to college because all the goldsteins she knows are doctors
I have two degrees. I'm tired of being gaslighted about 'hard work' when I'm not even allowed to compete AND HARASSED BY RECRUITER MOTHERFUCKERS WHEN TRYING TO GET A BETTER JOB

62255338
>>62255317
>Just let me scam and spam the entire board
Well faggot stop spamming and scamming people and maybe I wouldn't need a shrink.
If you think I'm going to stop exposing the faggot who ruined this board (you)
or spiritually the same jeet I don't give a shit, at this point everyone is until proven otherwise.
>mass reports any real anons off this board
You're the biggest faggot ever to walk this green earth.

62255362
>>62254999
Is will actually a women? Low T behaviour.

Just laugh about it bro.

62255447
>>62255257
Lbj famously did entire press conferences while taking a dump, whole press would be in the bathroom as he squeezed out some turds. Good way to assert dominance.

62255593
>>62255317
>comes in to defend himself
>leaves to go back to scamming on his computer versus his samefagging phone
Like clockwork
and I'm your scissorman.

62255891
>>62255338
You seem a little crazy anon, but I approve of what you're doing, godspeed

62255992
>>62254999
Unprofessional AF, but recr*iters are not real people worth respect so it's fine.

item.title: THE NUMBERS DO NOT LIE: - Save for only 11 years versus 26 years - Anna have 58% savings of TIME - Invest $55k versus $1… — 13 replies — 2.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE NUMBERS DO NOT LIE: - Save for only 11 years versus 26 years - Anna have 58% savings of TIME - Invest $55k versus $1…

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-20 22:15 UTC

OP

THE NUMBERS DO NOT LIE:
- Save for only 11 years versus 26 years - Anna have 58% savings of TIME
- Invest $55k versus $130k - Anna have 58% savings of MONEY invested
- Ending Balance of $615,580 versus $431,754 - Anna have 42% more saved for RETIREMENT

Anna is WAGMI.

Early replies (first 3)

62252692
Why is this person not getting raises and increasing their contributions for decades? Also lmao at modelling a fixed yearly return rate.

62252698
>>62252612
$2k a year from 18 to 28 is even better

62253330
It's always been "put in as much as you can, as early in life as you can".
Just wish someone told me that years ago.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62253379
>>62252612
I'm confused, what am I looking at? Did Anna just have a better market cycle and/or investment picks than Mike?

62254774
>>62252612
I don't even plan to be around by the time I'm 60. Fuck that

62254790
>anna loses her job and the market crashes 50%

62254795
>>62253379
These calculations are always based on an imaginary scenario where returns don't vary at all and the market is perfectly stable.

62254799
>>62252612
>the earlier you lock up your money in the financial pyrami... markets, the better you will be, cash outs are 100% guaranteed, and the later you cash out the better, trust me bro

62254812
>>62253379
Anna divorced Mike at no fault of his own but the court ordered him to give her half his income for the rest of their lives.

62254832
Anna is going to be killed in a crusade

62254833
>>62254790
exactly, but more likely:

anna spends her money on consumer bullshit
mike starts powerlifting at 55 and continues working, thus compounding his portfolio even more.

ive never seen a woman save money on her own, dad was always persuading or instructing her to even as adult.

62254938
religion of sp500 go up forever

62255954
What retarded misleading way to present this information. The real takeaway is start investing as soon as possible not only invest for 11 years instead of 26
